nasb.text: This is the number of the things for the tabernacle, the tabernacle of the testimony, as they were numbered according to the command of Moses, for the service of the Levites, by the hand of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

esv.text: These are the records of the tabernacle, the tabernacle of the testimony, as they were recorded at the commandment of Moses, the responsibility of the Levites under the direction of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

cnv.text: 這是帳幕內利未人使用的物件的總數，是照著摩西的吩咐，經亞倫祭司的兒子以他瑪的手計算的。

ccb.text: 以上是安放约柜的圣幕中所用的物品，是照摩西的吩咐，由亚伦祭司的儿子以他玛指挥利未人清点的。
